zh.lifeSummary: 當Dirk I van Brederode於1180年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德桑普爾吉努德時，他的父親Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederode18歲，母親Agniese van Holland25歲。他於1215年與Aleidis van Heusden在荷蘭努-布拉班特阿斯特斯登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1236年在荷蘭享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dirk I van Brederode于1180年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德桑普爾吉努德时，他的父亲Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederode18岁，母亲Agniese van Holland25岁。他于1215年与Aleidis van Heusden在荷兰努-布拉班特阿斯特斯登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1236年在荷兰享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Dirk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch form of Derek . Its use in the English-speaking world since the 1960s is largely due to the fame of the actor Dirk Bogarde ( 1921–99 , born Derek Niven van den Bogaerde ). He was of Dutch descent, although he was actually born in Scotland. The manly image of the name has been reinforced by its coincidence in form with Scottish dirk ‘dagger’ (from Gaelic durc).

en.lifeSummary: When Dirk I van Brederode was born in 1180, in Santpoort-Noord, North Holland, Netherlands, his father, Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederode, was 18 and his mother, Agniese van Holland, was 25. He married Aleidis van Heusden in 1215, in Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1236, in Netherlands, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dirk I van Brederode est né en 1180, à Santpoort-Noord, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederode, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Agniese van Holland, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Aleidis van Heusden en 1215, à Heusden, Asten, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1236, à Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dirk I van Brederode 1180 in Santpoort-Noord, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederode 18 und seine Mutter Agniese van Holland 25. Er hat 1215 in Heusden, Asten, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande Aleidis van Heusden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1236 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Niederlande.

it.Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands: Heusden, Asten, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi
it.lifeSummary: Quando Dirk I van Brederode è nato il nel 1180 nel Santpoort-Noord, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederode, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Agniese van Holland, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Aleidis van Heusden nel 1215, nel Heusden, Asten, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1236, nel Paesi Bassi, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dirk I van Brederodeが1180年にオランダノオルド-hオランドサントプオオルト-ノオルドで生まれた時，父Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederodeは18歳，母Agniese van Hollandは25歳であった。1215年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントアステンヘウスデンでAleidis van Heusdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1236年にオランダで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dirk I van Brederode(이)가 1180년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 산트포어트-노르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederode(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Agniese van Holland(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1215년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 애스텐 헤우즈든에서 Aleidis van Heusden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1236년 네덜란드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dirk I van Brederode nasceu em 1180, em Santpoort-Noord, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederode, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Agniese van Holland, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Aleidis van Heusden em 1215, em Heusden, Asten, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1236, em Países Baixos, com 56 anos.

ro.Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands: Heusden, Asten, Noord-Brabant, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dirk I van Brederode родился в 1180 г. в местности сантпурт-нурд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederode было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Agniese van Holland, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Aleidis van Heusden в 1215 г. в местности хеусден, астен, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1236 г. в местности Нидерланды в возрасте 56 лет.

es.Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands: Heusden, Asten, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dirk I van Brederode nació en 1180, en Santpoort-Noord, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Willem I van Teijlingen van Brederode, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Agniese van Holland, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Aleidis van Heusden en 1215, en Heusden, Asten, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1236, en Países Bajos, a la edad de 56 años.
